objective: Close the operational proof gap in the governance self-learning and healing loop by unblocking the weekly sweep before self-learning runs, refreshing the learning report, recording append-only write-back evidence, and adding a real error-pattern entry for the skipped-report failure mode.
scope_boundary: Modify governance repo surfaces needed to prove the self-learning loop is operational: model-pin scanner scope, hldpro-sim Codex provider test expectations, self-learning report outputs, operator-context write-back evidence, error/fail-fast pattern docs, progress/backlog mirrors, validation, closeout, and generated graph artifacts.
Keep the fix deterministic and local; do not add model inference, network-dependent self-learning behavior, or new autonomous write authority.
Use GitHub issue #475 as the governing epic/issue and preserve existing user changes in the main checkout.
out_of_scope: Changing Society of Minds model-routing policy.
Changing Codex CLI authentication behavior in the weekly sweep.
Running or modifying production GitHub secrets.
Replacing the deterministic lexical self-learning implementation with semantic/model-assisted clustering.
research_summary: The April 21 research pass found that the self-learning code path works locally, but operational proof is stale. The latest tracked self-learning report was generated on 2026-04-17 and indexed 62 entries, while a fresh local report indexed 130 entries. The 2026-04-20 scheduled overlord-sweep run failed at the codex model-pin validation step before self-learning report generation, because the checker scanned a mocked provider test and stale var/worktrees copies. No tracked raw/operator-context/self-learning artifact exists, and docs/ERROR_PATTERNS.md remains a stub.

sprints.name: Sweep unblock and proof artifacts
sprints.goal: Make the weekly sweep reach self-learning again and preserve evidence that the loop is current and issue-backed.
tasks: Restrict codex model-pin scanning away from stale local worktree mirrors under var/worktrees.
Align the hldpro-sim provider command and test mock assertion with the required pinned Codex invocation contract.
Add fail-fast and reusable error-pattern documentation for the sweep-staleness failure mode.
Write one append-only self-learning operator-context artifact for the April 2026 skipped-report failure.
Regenerate metrics/self-learning/latest.json and latest.md from the current corpus.
Record validation and closeout evidence, including local report generation and model-pin checker pass.
acceptance_criteria: python3 .github/scripts/check_codex_model_pins.py passes locally from the issue #475 worktree.
The checker no longer reports var/worktrees copies as authoritative source failures.
packages/hldpro-sim/hldprosim/providers.py and packages/hldpro-sim/tests/test_providers.py prove the provider command includes -m and model_reasoning_effort.
metrics/self-learning/latest.json has a 2026-04-21 generated_at timestamp and current entry count.
docs/ERROR_PATTERNS.md contains a non-stub Pattern entry for the skipped self-learning report failure mode.
Validation evidence names any remaining gaps before closeout.

specialist_reviews.focus: Determine whether the self-learning/healing loop is actually operating and identify proof gaps.
specialist_reviews.summary: The loop code works in isolation, but weekly operational proof is stale because the scheduled sweep failed before the self-learning report step; append-only write-back and error-pattern consolidation also lack real evidence.

specialist_reviews.focus: Confirm streamed events/tool calls can be watched and stalled worker sessions can be detected.
specialist_reviews.summary: The supervised Claude worker parallel-observable mode confirms that future worker execution can be watched for streamed events and stalls rather than leaving silent sessions hanging.
evidence: operator report in issue #475 session context

alternate_model_review.summary: This implementation is a deterministic local governance proof/unblock slice. No architecture or model-routing policy is changed; validation relies on local tests, model-pin checker, and generated evidence.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Issue #475 may update the model-pin checker, hldpro-sim provider test, self-learning proof artifacts, progress/backlog mirrors, fail-fast/error-pattern docs, validation, closeout, and generated graph outputs needed to prove the self-learning loop gap is closed.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Implement scoped fixes, run validation, record closeout, and report remaining remote GitHub sweep verification if it cannot be run locally.

material_deviation_rules: If codex model-pin validation still fails after excluding stale worktree mirrors, stop and record the remaining authoritative source path before closeout.
If packet-queue tests cannot run because dependencies are unavailable, install documented local test dependencies or record the dependency blocker explicitly.
If a manual GitHub workflow dispatch is needed to prove the remote scheduled sweep path, record local closure separately from remote follow-up and keep issue #475 open until remote proof is captured.
